replies.msg:
Coordinate the application of the Attention and Operation Model in Branch

Promote the products / Services of the Institution in the clients' yard and intensify with the clients the promotion to make the use of self-service means.

Coordinate adequately the material resources and the employees of the Branch.

Efficiently contribute with the control and security functions with the personnel designated as responsible for this function.

Appropriately assess risk when business decisions are made, demonstrating particular consideration for the firm's reputation and safeguarding Citigroup, its clients and assets, by driving compliance with applicable laws, rules and regulations, adhering to Policy, applying sound ethical judgment regarding personal behavior, conduct and business practices, and escalating, managing and reporting control issues with transparency.

Perform efficient and accurate banking transactions including, managing cash supply for the branch, processing incoming/outgoing cash deposits

Requirements:

2-4 years of experience in customer service

Consistently demonstrates clear and concise written and verbal communication

Able to build connection between our digital platform and our clients

Remodeling our clients banking behavior in embracing digitization

Education:

Bachelor's/University degree or equivalent experience

replies.msg:
有無巴打做treasury 或者money market desk
或者做ipo上市
利申retail背景想讀埋master cfa frm轉行
有無巴打聽過FXTM 最近有Agent R我入去做CS

分析財務報表係最基本 個客走黎借錢 你最基本要識睇佢盤 所以最好有financial statements 相關經驗
基次就係對客既行業了解

我諗香港好多银行入面Arm都會幫手寫credit proposal

如果你話Credit approval 都係呢兩條路發展

想問fg有冇咩program可以報
淨係知hsbc branch trainee

quote.msg:
e家好難可以直接由teller係出面轉做sales
建議係行山轉做sales先再轉出去

agent咁同我講

replies.msg:
好心啦，成日講到teller俾狗做，你估sales又唔係狗？
Teller每日埋啱數就走得，冇referral又點？又唔會炒又唔會行PIP。做得慢又點？閂門先再快手收工囉。
相反sales宜家環境你嗰日冇fee你嗰日就要打call，你一個禮拜冇，開會就開你名。

另外，teller學到retail banking好多基本知識，我見過好多fresh grad一入行就做gbo連幾點截票幾點到數都唔知，重好睇唔起teller。

以以前嘅環境，有心喺retail banking發展，做半年teller係俾你學好基本知識，同分行同事打好關係，用呢段時間考好牌，就可以轉sales role。
但宜家點解唔洗做，係因為冇teller肯轉，入到職做sales一唔到數就炒導致好多人走，turnover大到不得了，基本上每年銀行已經預咗三四月就換一換血咁。

Teller上有teller上嘅好，睇吓做得耐又有數嗰啲，大部份都真係teller上，識尊重operation同事。

講真，俾gbo兩萬令人工你去每日數銀紙，唔洗跑數，你肯唔肯？

replies.msg:
你理解能力係咪低撚到咁
入行，係講入成個retail banking行業呀，淨係講職位我會直接講做邊個位啦。
純粹講返做teller有做teller嘅好，冇強逼人一定要行呢條路，咁都叫吹奏？講返樓上情況，宜家得返恒生同東亞不停請sales，兩間都閪兩間都捽，新人入到去一定難做，比冇肺炎重衰。諗清楚想做咩，唔好盲目做sales如果唔係會好辛苦。

走極都請=個行業唔會息微？問心啦，除咗開戶口之外有咩時候要落分行？宜家開戶口，買保險，買UT ELD CLD都可以一個app搞掂，我直頭冇揾過我rm更何況gbo呢。分行愈嚟逾少，product出得逾嚟逾閪，資源分配去返top tier啲嘅客已經係咁多間銀行嘅大方向。
分行只會逾嚟逾惡做，客又閪，product又唔係特別，target又照加

quote.msg:
東亞銀行 2021年整死員工 Double Kills
https://lih.kg/2448697
- 分享自 LIHKG 討論區

警世

Cut OT錢姐

Bo都好難好難claim OT錢
其實間間sales都冇ot

好心啦，成日講到teller俾狗做，你估sales又唔係狗？
Teller每日埋啱數就走得，冇referral又點？又唔會炒又唔會行PIP。做得慢又點？閂門先再快手收工囉。
相反sales宜家環境你嗰日冇fee你嗰日就要打call，你一個禮拜冇，開會就開你名。

另外，teller學到retail banking好多基本知識，我見過好多fresh grad一入行就做gbo連幾點截票幾點到數都唔知，重好睇唔起teller。

以以前嘅環境，有心喺retail banking發展，做半年teller係俾你學好基本知識，同分行同事打好關係，用呢段時間考好牌，就可以轉sales role。
但宜家點解唔洗做，係因為冇teller肯轉，入到職做sales一唔到數就炒導致好多人走，turnover大到不得了，基本上每年銀行已經預咗三四月就換一換血咁。

Teller上有teller上嘅好，睇吓做得耐又有數嗰啲，大部份都真係teller上，識尊重operation同事。

講真，俾gbo兩萬令人工你去每日數銀紙，唔洗跑數，你肯唔肯？

留意返，我冇一句係維護行山，文盲？
成日狗前狗後，如果分行冇teller，冇人入嚟，啲sales有撚walk in咩，俾返少少尊重啦，大家都係打份工。
講咁多嘢你咪又係以為做到sales好似好高人一等，睇唔起teller

少少嘢就話人有着數，小人之心到

replies.msg:
爭咩
retail bank=隔離舖賣衫嘅垃圾sales
teller簡直低賤過做雞
街邊個阿叔都可以問候你全家
唔洗睇唔起大家

利申貓貓銀行做緊

純粹講brand name Citi 勁d
起碼美資 internal 好多mobility
你果個咩位 有冇jobs description 邊個division
你就咁講service specialist 人哋好難知道係咩

Coordinate the application of the Attention and Operation Model in Branch

Promote the products / Services of the Institution in the clients' yard and intensify with the clients the promotion to make the use of self-service means.

Coordinate adequately the material resources and the employees of the Branch.

Efficiently contribute with the control and security functions with the personnel designated as responsible for this function.

Appropriately assess risk when business decisions are made, demonstrating particular consideration for the firm's reputation and safeguarding Citigroup, its clients and assets, by driving compliance with applicable laws, rules and regulations, adhering to Policy, applying sound ethical judgment regarding personal behavior, conduct and business practices, and escalating, managing and reporting control issues with transparency.

Perform efficient and accurate banking transactions including, managing cash supply for the branch, processing incoming/outgoing cash deposits

Requirements:

2-4 years of experience in customer service

Consistently demonstrates clear and concise written and verbal communication

Able to build connection between our digital platform and our clients

Remodeling our clients banking behavior in embracing digitization

Education:

Bachelor's/University degree or equivalent experience
